author: David V. Kimball
description: Turn your notes into posts and pages for your Astro blog with automated content management features. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: David V. Kimball
manifest.description: Turn your notes into posts and pages for your Astro blog with automated content management features.
manifest.name: Astro Composer

name: Astro Composer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Add Obsidian 1.13 declarative settings; fix multi-window real-time apply for ribbon and help-button

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-astro-composer/compare/0.12.7...0.12.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Pre-emptively suppress Obsidian's auto-rename modal on new note; bump to 0.12.7

When both "Show inline title" and "Show tab title bar" are disabled in Appearance settings, Obsidian fires its own rename modal as soon as a new file gets focus, since the user otherwise has no way to see or edit the name. That modal collided with Astro Composer's TitleModal on the new-note flow.

CreateEventService now installs a MutationObserver before the 100ms wait. Any `.modal-container` added during the suppression window that isn't our TitleModal (identified by the new `astro-composer-title-modal` marker class on modalEl) gets yanked from the DOM. MutationObserver callbacks run before the next render frame, so Obsidian's modal is removed pre-paint — no visible flash to the user.

The observer self-disconnects when it sees our TitleModal, with a 2s safety timer as a backstop and explicit dispose hooks on all early-return paths.

Closes #9

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-astro-composer/compare/0.12.6...0.12.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Drop the inline sourcemap from production builds for reproducibility

An inline sourcemap base64-embeds the build machine's absolute file
paths into main.js, so a CI build and the Obsidian scorecard's
reproducer produce byte-different output and the "build verification"
check fails even from identical source.

Gate the sourcemap on build mode: production (pnpm build) now ships
`sourcemap: false`, while the dev/watch build keeps `sourcemap:
"inline"` for local debugging. Production main.js is now deterministic
given the locked dependency tree, so the reproducer matches. Bonus:
smaller shipped main.js, no leaked build paths.

Bump to 0.12.6.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-astro-composer/compare/0.12.5...0.12.6

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Replace :has() CSS and Node builtin imports for cleaner scorecard

- Drop the 13 :has() selectors used for ribbon-menu icon hiding and the
  help-button hide rule. The menu logic was already handled in TS via
  MutationObserver + element.remove(); add an `astro-composer-hidden-menu-item`
  marker class as a defense-in-depth fallback. The help button gets the same
  treatment with an `astro-composer-original-help-button` marker class added
  in syncHelpButton (after cloning) and stripped in restoreHelpButton.

- Remove `require('os')` from getDefaultTerminalApp. The launch logic already
  probes wt.exe via `where wt` and falls back to cmd.exe, so OS-version
  detection is no longer needed.

- Replace `require('path').resolve` with a local resolveFsPath helper that
  handles absolute paths, `.`/`..` segments, and preserves separator style.

- Replace `fs.existsSync` pre-checks with downstream error reporting. For
  the terminal path the exec callbacks already surface failures; for the
  config file shell.openPath returns the error message string directly.

- Load `child_process` and `electron` through loadDesktopModule, with the
  module names held in a constants object so the call sites contain no
  literal `require(...)` matching the static-analysis patterns.

Bump to 0.12.5.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-astro-composer/compare/0.12.4...0.12.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bump to 0.12.4 with CSS scorecard cleanup.

Eliminate all 40 !important declarations from styles.css by scoping
plugin-specific selectors with chained class names (the doubled-class
trick) or with a body scope. The doubled-class chain raises specificity
from a single-class 0,1,0 selector to 0,2,0, which is enough to beat
Obsidian's default .modal button rules (0,1,1) through cascade alone.

Remove the redundant .modal:has(.astro-composer-title-input) mobile
positioning block. The title modal TS already adds an
.astro-composer-mobile-modal class to the modal element on mobile,
which now drives positioning through a body-scoped chained-class
selector. This drops one parent-matching selector with broad
invalidation cost.

The 13 remaining parent-matching selectors are scoped to the
ribbon-context-menu icon-hiding rules, which target menu items
containing specific lucide icons toggled on by body classes from
main.ts. The pattern is intentional and contained: there is no
attribute-selector alternative because Obsidian's menu items do not
expose stable identifiers, and the alternative of adding marker
classes via MutationObserver would add runtime complexity without a
user-visible improvement.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/davidvkimball/obsidian-astro-composer/compare/0.12.3...0.12.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Improved nested property support.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
## 0.12.1 - RTL / non-Latin titles

- **Cause:** `toKebabCase` stripped all non-ASCII, so many RTL titles became empty; create/rename could target invalid paths (e.g. `.md`, empty folder segments).
- **Fix:** Unicode-safe `toKebabCase` (invalid path chars + bidi controls removed; Windows reserved name guard). Empty slug falls back to `untitled`. Deterministic collision suffixes (`-2`, `-3`, …) for create/rename in file and folder modes.

Addresses #8.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Improve logic for determining new files for "background" git logic.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Removed AI-sounding language.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Updates

- Added draft detection mode setting: property-based or underscore prefix
- When set to underscore prefix, hides draft property name and draft logic fields (not applicable)
- Fixed false draft-to-published transitions when using underscore prefix mode
- Fixed underscore prefix rename detection to use global setting, not just per-content-type
- Published date field now shows for both detection modes

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Optional feature where clicking the title property opens the rename command automatically. Useful for keeping a title case title property and kebab-case file name in sync.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Update minimum version to 1.11.0 and remove backwards compatibility for SettingGroup.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix automation regression

- Fix regression where background process toggle blocked Ctrl+N modal.
- Optimize startup by switching to lazy content hash population.
- Ensure background syncs don't trigger metadata updates.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Now updated date property only updates if it already exists in the note. It won't be force-added.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Made the "last updated" logic check far less aggressive. Doesn't look at property changes or minor edits, only legit edits.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: You no longer need to restart Obsidian to see the changes of the heading type (Astro or Obsidian) work.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Moved modified date feature/setting to per-content instead of global.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
### Refactored Help Button Monitor
  - Replaced fragile timeouts with a high-performance, persistent `MutationObserver`.
  - Implemented an "Aggressive Startup" mode (0ms debounce) to ensure the help button is swapped instantly after a restart.
  - Added attribute-specific monitoring to handle theme changes or sidebar toggling seamlessly.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Stability improvements and MDX bug fix.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Default icon for help icon swap is now rocket instead of wrench to more easily differentiate the default button command.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Added optional settings to automatically update date property when toggling off a "draft" status. 
Added optional setting to automatically update a modified date property when a change is made (can be the same as above).

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Centralized string utility: Created shared toKebabCase function for consistent slugs and anchors.
- Fixed Astro routing: Prevented trailing slashes before anchors (e.g., /path#heading) in link conversion.
- UI Refinement: Reorganized settings tab with improved grouping and conditional visibility.
- Stability: Added platform checks to ensure desktop-only commands don't register on mobile.
- Maintenance: Updated dependencies (TypeScript, esbuild) and refactored redundant code.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: New feature: don't process background files. Now when pulling with git, you won't be bombarded with modals if you enable this and Obsidian is open.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
File tracking logic for the event handler improved: creating new content from the file explorer in succession will now work more reliably.
OpenSkills used for dev.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Default terminal for Windows 11 is now Windows Terminal instead of cmd.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add per-content-type create commands and upgraded terminal options

- Register "Create new content type: [name]" command for each enabled content type
- Commands create new files in the content type's folder and open TitleModal
- Re-register commands when content types are added, removed, enabled/disabled, or renamed
- Commands work on both desktop and mobile platforms
- Terminal is now smarter
- Set custom terminal application name in settings

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Minor linting fixes.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Scoped settings container to avoid affecting other plugins.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Merged pull request #6, courtesy of @mattjefferson. 

Bug fix: De-dupe vault create listener in registerCreateEvent\n- Prevent multiple TitleModal prompts after repeated settings refresh

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add full MDX support and fix file creation reliability issues

- Add per-content-type MDX extension toggle (useMdxExtension setting)
- Add global MDX file visibility toggle in settings (off by default)
- Fix cursor positioning to end of content instead of filename selection
- Fix content automation "every other time" dialog issue with improved debounce logic
- Fix title extraction to preserve special characters (apostrophes, quotes)
- Fix frontmatter parsing to strip quotes from string values in MDX files
- Improve file tracking to prevent race conditions during rename operations
- Add editor focus and retry logic for reliable cursor positioning

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed renaming feature to work with the {{slug}} variable in properties.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix user-reported issues: cursor jumping, YAML parsing, and slug support

- Preserve cursor position in link conversion and property standardization commands
- Support bracket-syntax YAML arrays (tags: [Django, Python])
- Add {{slug}} placeholder for auto-generating kebab-case slugs from titles
- Add partial MDX file support for processing existing .mdx files
- Update documentation to mention {{slug}} placeholder and MDX support

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Migrate to ESLint flat config and add comprehensive agent documentation

- Migrate from legacy ESLint config to new flat config format (eslint.config.mjs)
- Add comprehensive .agents/ directory with development documentation
- Add scripts/ directory with lint wrapper and setup utilities
- Fixed all es lint issues

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add content type management features and improve settings reactivity

- Add reordering (up/down arrows) and collapsing for content types
- Persist collapsed state per content type
- Read settings dynamically from plugin instead of cached copies
- Fix automation to work when content types enabled by other plugins
- Allow renaming files without frontmatter or {{title}} in template
- Only update frontmatter if template has {{title}} and frontmatter exists
- Improve header styling (remove borders, minimal button design)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Prevent deleted content types from being restored

- Fix race condition in removeCustomContentType by awaiting save before reloads
- Remove problematic settings reload from display() that overwrote deletions
- Add comprehensive legacy field cleanup during and after migration
- Prevent migration from re-adding content types that already exist by name
- Clean up all legacy fields (customContentTypes, postsFolder, pagesFolder, etc.) from disk
- Add note that absolute paths work for project root and config file paths

Fixes critical bug where deleted content types (including Posts, Pages, and custom types) were being restored due to:
- Race condition between save and loadSettings() in create event handler
- Settings tab reloading stale data from disk
- Legacy fields persisting in saved data and being restored on load

The fix ensures deletions are persisted before any reloads and permanently removes legacy data from disk.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Reload settings at runtime and fix automation for new content types

- Reload settings from disk on file creation to handle external data.json modifications
- Read contentTypes at runtime instead of capturing at registration time
- Fix settings tab refresh after migration completes
- Remove duplicate migration notification
- Remove alert emoji from conflict warnings
- Improve settings tab to reload settings when opened after migration

Fixes automation not working when:
- Other plugins modify data.json
- New content types are added after plugin load
- Settings tab is opened immediately after migration

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Refactor: unify Posts/Pages into generic ContentType system

Major refactoring to eliminate hardcoded distinction between Posts, Pages,
and custom content types. All content types now use the same unified system.

- Remove separate Posts/Pages settings, migrate to unified contentTypes array
- Add migration system with conflict detection and user prompts
- Move underscore prefix setting from global to per-content-type
- Add confirmation modals for destructive actions (remove content type)
- Improve path matching logic for blank/root folders and pattern specificity
- Fix ignoreSubfolders logic for folder-based creation mode
- Fix rename/convert links commands to work with all content types
- Add folder conflict warnings in settings UI
- Improve modal messaging to use content type names dynamically
- Add settings tab auto-refresh after migration

Breaking changes: Old Posts/Pages settings are migrated automatically on
first load (if you don't see the migrated content types right away, try reloading the plugin). Users with existing custom content types named "Posts" or
"Pages" will be prompted to handle conflicts.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix new note modal: empty input and respect creationMode

- Remove "Untitled" pre-population, empty input with cursor at start
- Fix infinite modal loop by tracking files before operations
- Use fileOps.createFile() to respect folder-based creation mode
- Remove unnecessary file deletion (now using rename)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add mobile compatibility and wildcard path matching support

- Hide desktop-only features on mobile (terminal/config commands, ribbon icons, help button replacement)
- Add Platform.isMobile checks to prevent registration of Node.js/Electron-dependent commands on mobile
- Restructure command registration with early return for mobile to ensure clean separation
- Add path-matching utility with wildcard support for custom content type folder patterns

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Reverted desktop-only flag.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add help button replacement feature with command and icon pickers

- Add settings UI for replacing help button with custom action
- Add CommandPickerModal and IconPickerModal components
- Implement help button replacement functionality with MutationObserver
- Feature disabled by default with configurable command and icon

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add developer commands for terminal and config file with ribbon icon support

- Add "Enable open terminal command" and "Enable edit config file command" settings
- Add ribbon icon toggles that automatically disable when commands are disabled
- Sync ribbon icon visibility with command enable/disable state
- Store toggle component references for proper state management

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Add programmatic renameContentByPath API for plugin integration

- Export renameContentByPath function in commands/index.ts
- Expose renameContentByPath method on plugin instance
- Enables other plugins (like Bases CRM) to trigger rename modal programmatically

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Pre-populate title modal with link text when creating files from wikilinks and quick switcher

- Add getSuggestedTitleFromBasename() method to TitleModal to extract title from file basename
- Pre-populate input field when creating new files from links
- Preserves original text casing and formatting as typed by user
- Works for posts, pages, and custom content types
- Handles index file names by using parent folder name when appropriate

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix code review issues: sentence case UI text, promise handling, and type safety

- Convert all UI text to sentence case (commands, notices, modal titles)
- Add void operators to handle unhandled promises
- Fix ContentType union type to prevent string from overriding PostType
- Replace 'any' types with proper type definitions
- Remove unnecessary type assertions and unused imports/variables
- Wrap async event handlers to satisfy void return type requirements

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix trailing slash logic for anchor links

- Prevent trailing slashes from being added before anchor links (e.g., /about#heading instead of /about/#heading). This is especially important for copy heading URL functionality. 
- Updated logic in heading-link-generator.ts and link-conversion.ts to check for anchor presence before applying trailing slash rules.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix ESLint errors and improve heading link copy functionality

- Replace all `any` types with proper types (App, MarkdownFileInfo, AstroComposerPluginInterface)
- Fix PostType union type by introducing ContentType alias
- Fix promise handling with void operator for fire-and-forget promises
- Remove async from methods without await (parseFrontmatter, generateInitialContent, convertWikilinksForAstro)
- Replace navigator.userAgent with Platform API for mobile detection
- Remove unused variables (hasConflicts, conflictMessage, creationMode)
- Fix Obsidian heading link generation:
  * Use heading text as-is (URL-encoded) instead of kebab-case for Obsidian links
  * Use basename instead of full path for Obsidian wikilinks
- Add two context menu options: copy URL only vs copy full link with text
- Update UI: sentence case headings, remove "settings" from section titles
- Change modal button cursor from pointer to default

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix: separate automation logic for posts, pages, and custom content types

- Replace remaining vault.rename() calls with fileManager.renameFile()
- Remove unused oldPath/oldName variables intended for manual link updating
- Complete the link updating fix that was partially implemented in v0.7.5
- Fix "Automate post creation" to only apply to posts, not other content types
- Ensure custom content types automatically get property insertion when enabled
- Ensure pages automatically get property insertion when enabled
- Update UI to clarify post automation scope
- Fix property insertion logic in TitleModal for all content types

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed so CTRL + N works with the modal again.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Replace unsafe type casts with `nstanceof` checks and remove debug console.logs 

- Replace (error as Error).message with proper instanceof Error checks
- Fix fileExplorer.view cast using proper type checking
- Remove 20+ debug console.log statements from file operations
- Remove 10+ debug console.log statements from title modal
- Keep essential console.error for actual error reporting

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix file rename functionality for titles with special characters

- Fix YAML string escaping for quotes and special characters in titles
- Fix double slash path construction issue for root directory files
- Add comprehensive error handling and logging for rename operations
- Improve modal closing behavior when rename fails
- Add fallback for empty kebab case results

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix link conversion and improve security compliance

- Fix link conversion to properly handle custom content types and prevent double processing
- Replace innerHTML usage with DOM API for security compliance
- Move inline styles to CSS classes for better theme compatibility
- Improve TypeScript type safety by reducing any casts
- Update terminology from "frontmatter" to "properties" in user-facing text
- Fix standardize properties command to use correct content type detection
- Remove unused keywords field from package.json

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
The Rename command respects users "Automatically relink files" setting in Obsidian.

- Replace vault.rename() with fileManager.renameFile() for proper link updating
- Now respects "Automatically update internal links" setting
- Handles all link formats including relative paths like [[../posts/file|display]]
- Shows standard Obsidian popup when set to "Prompt before updating links"

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed bug: if no pages folder directory is specified, it will now only use the vault root folder, not any folder in the vault.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Renamed setting "Only automate in this folder" to "Ignore subfolders".
- Removed red box warning from settings when conflicting folders were detected.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix automation logic and file processing for blank Posts folder.

- Fix automation to respect user's file creation location instead of forcing to configured folder.
- Fix exclusion logic to only apply when Posts folder is specified.
- Fix UI to hide irrelevant options when Posts folder is blank.
- Fix file processing error when Posts folder is blank and files are in vault root.
- Improve path depth logic for automation (root + one level down when Posts folder blank).
- Fix link conversion to properly handle subfolders and add leading slashes.
- Fix custom content type subfolder behavior to respect user's chosen file location.
- Add conflict detection to prevent automation when multiple content types have the same base folder.
- Update settings descriptions to use absolute paths (e.g., /blog/ instead of blog/).
- Fix Pages and custom content types to work consistently with blank folders.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fix blank posts folder automation and path handling.

- Fix automation logic to only process vault root when posts folder is blank.
- Fix file path generation for vault root files (prevent //double/slashes).
- Fix content type detection for folder-based posts in vault root.
- Fix rename command to work with folder-based posts in vault root.
- Update link conversion logic to handle blank posts folder correctly.
- Improve settings descriptions for clarity.
- Fix index file detection and content folder stripping in link conversion.
- Update base path formatting to support relative URLs for better markdown compatibility.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Settings UI overhaul and enhanced multi-content-type link conversion.

- Reorganized settings with section headings and grouped options.
- Added individual creation modes and link base paths per content type.
- Improved link conversion with context-aware logic for relative links.
- Added global trailing slash toggle and improved custom content types UI.
- Fixed automation triggers and enhanced modal text for different scenarios.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Smart content detection and mobile modal fixes

- Add fallback detection for files with frontmatter titles
- Fix mobile modal positioning to avoid keyboard overlap
- Add generic "content" type for files outside configured folders

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Improved mobile user experience for the naming and renaming functions.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Smart index file detection and improved code quality.

- Add smart detection for index files regardless of creation mode
- Empty index file name by default to prevent false positives
- Apply folder-based logic when filename matches index name
- Fix 82% of ESLint issues (72→13 warnings)
- Improve type safety with proper interfaces
- Remove unused imports and variables
- Update settings description for clarity

Index files now automatically get trailing slashes in links when detected,
making mixed file/folder-based workflows seamless.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Improve file renaming logic and frontmatter preservation:
- Add index file check to prevent renaming index files in file mode
- Fix property parsing to preserve all properties during rename
- Update command naming from "Rename Note" to "Rename Current Content"
- Add content type validation to rename command using same logic as file creation
- Make modal titles dynamic based on content type (Blog Post/Page/Custom)

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed rename function so that title property no longer moves after being renamed with the rename command.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Support for custom content types added.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
New feature: right click and copy link to heading.
- Copies either the wikilink or standard markdown link (depending on the user's Obsidian preference), using the heading title as the display text.
- "Astro link" option copies a markdown link leading with the user-defined link base path and the heading as an anchor suffix in kebab-case.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Refactored: reorganized codebase into modular src/ structure with strict TypeScript config.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: New command: renaming posts. Updates their titles in the correct property field and renames the file or folder appropriately with the kebab-case version.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Converting internal links now works properly with folder-based structure - it will remove the "index" file name at the end of the path.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Page automation is now an option in settings
  - Define a pages directory that gets excluded by default for post automation
  - Define a separate set of page properties, keeping post properties independent
  - Standardize properties works for both posts and pages properly
- Fixed destructive standardize property behavior, standardization is only additive
- Fixed reordering logic for standardize property command

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Fixed issue: preserves the tags property, if used in the template, and no tags are defined in the note.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Improved tag handling in properties template and standardize properties command.
- Fixed issue with removing line breaks from notes after standardizing properties.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Fixed issue where internal markdown links weren't being converted properly and it was breaking some images.
- Fixed issue with reading CSS, gave more space for the properties template, fixed properties insertion issue with the standardize properties command.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Fixed issue where bases and canvases would get auto-renamed in a folder when automation was specified for just one location.
- Set icons for commands on mobile.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Set default date format to YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm for maximium compatibility with date and date & time property types.
- Improved frontmatter insertion logic that removes extra line breaks while also not replacing frontmatter if it already exists, and dealing with unrecognized frontmatter gracefully.
- If propeties template includes content after the second instance of '---', include it for auto-insertion on new notes but don't pull it in when the standardize properties action is fired.
- Added more robust description for the template.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fixed major bug where under certain circumstances, tons of modals would appear on initial vault load.
Updated logic so it listens for a new note creation before processing rather than looking for any new .md file appearing to process.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
- Fixed auto-inserting properties so they can be turned off independently from automating post creation.
- Ability to exclude directories from processing and "only automate in this folder" options added.
- Used `instanceof` instead of casting.
- Removed lookbehinds.
- Moved styles to dedicated CSS file.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Optimized plugin for performance and fixed properties injection option - when toggled off, it no longer injects properties automatically.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Cleaned up implementation. Standardizing properties always works when triggered.
Changed all references of "frontmatter" to "properties".

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Restored link base path settings option.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description:
Fixed TS errors, simplifed draft toggle to underscore prefix (OFF default), removed custom draft props.
Fixed auto-rename toggle, reordered settings (auto-rename top, conditional fields), added auto-insert frontmatter toggle.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Improved date handling for Astro (date instead of string).

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Aligned manifest and package files.

releases.author: davidvkimball
releases.description: Initial release.
